description: LinkedIn Integration — OAuth, profile enrichment, cross-posting

tasks.title: LinkedIn Service — OAuth and Share
tasks.prompt:
Implement the LinkedIn Service (M6.1 + M6.2) as specified in SNAPP-TRD.md.

Create Snapp.Service.LinkedIn with:

1. OAuth endpoints:
   GET /api/linkedin/auth-url — generate LinkedIn OAuth 2.0 authorization URL (client_id, redirect_uri, scope: openid profile email w_member_social, state: CSRF token)
   POST /api/linkedin/callback — exchange code for token, fetch profile (userinfo endpoint), encrypt LinkedIn access token + URN, store in snapp-users LINKEDIN item, update profile completeness (+15%)
   GET /api/linkedin/status — return link status, name, token expiry
   POST /api/linkedin/unlink — delete LINKEDIN item

2. Share endpoints:
   POST /api/linkedin/share — format content as LinkedIn post, publish via Share API (w_member_social), append '— via PraxisIQ {deeplink}', rate limit 25/day/user

3. For local dev/testing: mock the LinkedIn API. Create a MockLinkedInClient that returns synthetic profile data and logs share requests instead of hitting real LinkedIn. Use ILinkedInClient interface so the real implementation can be swapped in for production.

Dockerfile + docker-compose (snapp-linkedin, port 8088). Kong route: /api/linkedin/*.

Integration tests: OAuth flow with mock, verify encrypted token stored, verify profile enrichment, verify share (mock), verify rate limiting.
tasks.done_when: LinkedIn service runs with mock client. OAuth flow works. Share works (mocked). Token encrypted. Tests pass.

tasks.title: LinkedIn UI
tasks.prompt:
Implement LinkedIn UI using MudBlazor as specified in M6.3.

1. Components/LinkedIn/LinkButton.razor:
   - If not linked: MudButton 'Connect LinkedIn' with LinkedIn icon → redirect to OAuth URL
   - If linked: MudChip 'LinkedIn Connected' with checkmark, MudButton Variant=Text 'Unlink'

2. Components/LinkedIn/CrossPostToggle.razor:
   - MudSwitch 'Also share on LinkedIn' in post composer
   - Only visible if LinkedIn is linked
   - When enabled + post submitted: call /api/linkedin/share after post creation
   - MudIcon LinkedIn logo indicator

3. Update onboarding Step 3: wire the 'Link your LinkedIn' button to actual OAuth flow
4. Update profile page: show LinkedIn link status
5. Update PostComposer: include CrossPostToggle

6. bUnit tests.
tasks.done_when: LinkedIn link/unlink works. Cross-post toggle in post composer. Onboarding wired. bUnit tests pass.

tasks.title: Sprint 12 integration validation
tasks.prompt: Validate Sprint 12. Run all tests. Walkthrough: link LinkedIn (mock OAuth), verify profile enrichment, create post with cross-post toggle, verify share logged (mock). Write .claude/reports/sprint-12-validation.md.
tasks.done_when: All tests pass. LinkedIn integration works with mock. Validation report written.
